k_anonymity.message: Error during computation: float division by zero
k_anonymity.metric_description_report: Evaluates K-Anonymity over quasi-identifiers (each equivalence class must have at least k records).
k_anonymity.user_justification_report: Since no weight has been assigned, the default weight 5 has been used

l_diversity.metric_description_report: Computes L-Diversity by grouping on quasi-identifiers and counting distinct values of a sensitive attribute.
l_diversity.user_justification_report: Since no weight has been assigned, the default weight 5 has been used

t_closeness.metric_description_report: Computes Wasserstein distance between global and group distributions of a sensitive attribute, grouped by quasi-identifiers.
t_closeness.user_justification_report: Since no weight has been assigned, the default weight 5 has been used
